body.title: dsimnel: short name + repo-root launcher script
body.result: dsimnel launcher at repo root, __main__.py entry point, semaphore wired. commit 5b7b1af2.
body.description:
Use 'dsimnel' as the canonical short name for DickSimnel.0 — 'ds' conflicts with the OS 'ds' utility (data structures tool on some distros). Add a launcher script at repo root: `dsimnel` (symlink or thin wrapper) that starts the DickSimnel shim and sets DickSimnel.0.available.true semaphore on startup, DickSimnel.0.available.false on clean exit. Mirrors the pattern expected by Granny's _dicksimnel_available() check.

**Affected files:** repo root (new launcher script), devices/dicksimnel/shim.py (set semaphore on start/stop), any code using 'DS' as a variable prefix where it shadows OS tools
**Design rules:** semaphore protocol: ~/.granny/available/DickSimnel.0.available.true present = available; .false wins; external state principle applies (flag survives shim crash by being file-based)
**Scope boundary:** IN: launcher script, semaphore wiring in shim, rename 'ds' variable refs in dsimnel code. OUT: renaming DickSimnel's class names or device ID.
**Completion criteria:** `./dsimnel` at repo root starts DickSimnel and sets availability flag; Granny's _dicksimnel_available() returns True when dsimnel is running; flag cleared on clean stop; test covers semaphore set/clear lifecycle
